---
title: "Ordering of diphenylalanine micro/nanotubes prepared in PDMS microchannels with and without electric field"
date: 2026-05-01
author:
  - name: Carlos, Giovana Bonano
  - name: Bandeira, Carla Carolina Silva
  - name: Batista, André Mourão
  - name: Elegbe, Benjamin Osebi
  - name: Lima, Eduardo C.
  - name: Marques, Breno
  - name: Martinho, Herculano
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Materials Science and Engineering: B"
  volume: 327
  doi: "10.1016/j.mseb.2026.119285"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Ordering of diphenylalanine micro/nanotubes prepared in PDMS microchannels with and without electric field</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
